content: OpenCTI 6.x minimum required env vars: APP__PORT, APP__BASE_URL, APP__ADMIN__EMAIL, APP__ADMIN__PASSWORD, APP__ADMIN__TOKEN, ELASTICSEARCH__URL, REDIS__HOSTNAME, REDIS__PORT, RABBITMQ__HOSTNAME, RABBITMQ__PORT, RABBITMQ__USERNAME, RABBITMQ__PASSWORD, MINIO__ENDPOINT, MINIO__PORT, MINIO__USE_SSL, MINIO__ACCESS_KEY, MINIO__SECRET_KEY. NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 is important for memory. The docker-compose.yml already has all required vars. Version in use: opencti/platform:6.4.0.
